comments.body: Thanks @jelly, can you please squash the commit into one, also the `Signed-off-by` line is missing in the commits.

> Thanks @jelly, can you please squash the commit into one, also the `Signed-off-by` line is missing in the commits.

Sorry about that, I've now changed my config to sign off for the podman repo by default :)
I added CI:DOCS to the title if you force push it should work now. We don't need to run all tests for such a change.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *jelly*, *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
